title: Color Code Converter
description: Free online color converter. Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL, and HSB/HSV instantly. Color picker included.
label: Color Input
inputHint: Enter HEX (#fff or #ffffff), RGB (rgb(255,255,255)), or HSL (hsl(0,100%,50%))

howToUse.label: Enter a color
howToUse.description: Type a HEX code (#fff, #ffffff), RGB value (rgb(255,0,0)), or pick a color with the color picker.

howToUse.label: View conversions
howToUse.description: All formats (HEX, RGB, HSL, HSB) are calculated and displayed instantly.

howToUse.label: Copy a value
howToUse.description: Click the copy button next to any format to copy it to your clipboard.

faq.question: What color formats does this tool support?
faq.answer: This tool supports HEX (3 or 6 digit), RGB, HSL, and HSB/HSV color formats. You can enter a color in any of these formats and it will be converted to all others.

faq.question: What is the difference between HSL and HSB?
faq.answer: HSL (Hue, Saturation, Lightness) uses lightness where 50% is a pure color and 100% is white. HSB/HSV (Hue, Saturation, Brightness/Value) uses brightness where 100% is the pure color and 0% is black. Both share the same Hue scale.

faq.question: Can I enter color names like 'red' or 'blue'?
faq.answer: Yes, standard CSS color names (red, blue, coral, etc.) are supported via the browser's color parsing engine.

faq.question: Is alpha/transparency supported?
faq.answer: The current version handles opaque colors (no alpha channel). RGBA and HSLA support is planned for a future update.

faq.question: How is HEX converted to RGB?
faq.answer: A 6-digit HEX color is split into three pairs of hexadecimal digits, each converted to a decimal number (0–255) representing the Red, Green, and Blue components.
